title: Verify durable receipt and interrupted resume
preconditions: A multi-candidate approved manifest, durable receipt store, idempotent LEDGER contract, and fault injection at every commit boundary are available.
steps: Inject termination and receipt failures before and after LEDGER effects and receipt durability, then run status and repeated resume.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-DURABLE-RECEIPT-RESUME holds; each candidate reaches one terminal or explicit unresolved outcome and no second canonical transaction is created.
